normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 2 of 8 (Applecross and Mount Pleasant Localities)
version_date: Plot date 16 February 2023 (Version No 1; LPS6 gazetted Friday 27 May 2016)
scope_summary: Statutory scheme map sheet 2 of 8 under the City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 covering the Applecross and Mount Pleasant localities. Depicts local scheme zones and reserves, Metropolitan Region Scheme region reserves, and R-Codes density codings (R12.5, R20, R40 and others visible in the extracted labels). Used to determine the zoning and density coding applicable to individual lots in these localities.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume is expected; extracted text is map labels and legend only
extractor-generated summary.json title is garbled OCR of map labels ('D R12.5 D U N C R AI G R O A...') and its version_date is empty - the plot date 16 February 2023 appears in full_text.txt
OCR of map labels yields fragmented street-name strings; spatial zoning/coding assignments are not recoverable from text alone - use the original PDF or GIS data for lot-level determinations
